title: Pigea debilissima
constituents: Pigea debilissima, also known as the Chilean lavender, contains active constituents such as essential oils and phenolic compounds. These compounds provide the plant with its medicinal properties. The essential oil of Pigea debilissima is rich in camphor, borneol, and other terpenes, which contribute to its fragrance and therapeutic effects. Additionally, the plant contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Further research is needed to fully understand the extent of its active constituents and their effects on human health.
